column1: # CLOSED-AS-MOOT (2026-05-02 routing override): the alpha defaults to Groq for Phase
# 3/4/5 paths because the user has GROQ_API_KEY and not ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Groq does
# not support Anthropic-shaped prompt caching; the cache_control breakpoints in
# server/prompt-builders.ts are silently dropped at runtime on the Groq path.
# The 87% structural cacheable-prefix calculation (Phase 1 entry criterion) remains
# documentation-only. It would re-activate the moment an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is added or
# a caller passes a BYOK Anthropic LLMConfig. The cache-breakpoint placement is still
# correct architecture (see server/test/cache-breakpoint.test.ts — passing) and is
# This sentinel CSV deliberately stays as the only artifact — no live Anthropic call
